testcase.name: Add a delete button and remove it
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Add Remove Elements page..................................passed When I click the Add Element button.........................................passed Then I should see a Delete button...........................................passed When I click the Delete button..............................................passed Then I should not see any Delete button.....................................passed

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................passed When I search for "GitHub"..................................................passed Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................passed
